item.description:
FPL BlackBox @FPLBlackBox_ · 26s Join @FplMode and @FPLMeerkat for Late Tackle tonight at 8:30.
There will be expected line ups for all DGW teams.
You won’t want to miss it.
#fplcommunity youtube.com Late Tackle | GW 33 | Fantasy Premier League Tips 25/26 | FPL BlackBox Andy and FPL Meerkat answer your GW33 dilemmas ahead of the impending deadline!---------------------------------------------- All team / player stats shown... 1 1 15

item.title:
FPL_Harry: Harry @FPL_Harry · 1min Anyone going differential to Tavernier? #FPL
Another Bournemouth attacker maybe 4 10 421
item.description:

item.title: spbajko: Simon Bajkowski @spbajko · 3min A post-press conference podcast on a bleary-eyed Bernardo Silva and why Guardiola has #m
item.description: Simon Bajkowski @spbajko · 3min A post-press conference podcast on a bleary-eyed Bernardo Silva and why Guardiola has #mcfc seeing clearly ahead of Arsenal youtube.com Talking City - A Manchester City Podcast "Bernardo is one of City's GREATS": Manchester City v Arsenal preview #ManchesterCity #Arsenal 7 510

item.title:
Plettigoal: Florian Plettenberg @Plettigoal · 5min Marco Rose to Bournemouth - DONE DEAL
Full agreement reached, as he was the to
item.description:
Florian Plettenberg @Plettigoal · 5min Marco Rose to Bournemouth - DONE DEAL
Full agreement reached, as he was the top candidate, as reported. Long-term contract. Rose’s dream was always to join a Premier League club - now it’s done. He will become the new head coach next season. @SkySportDE
6 10 148 4 mil

item.title: City_Xtra: City Xtra @City_Xtra · 9min Erling Haaland on the Premier League Golden Boot race: "I think Igor [Thiago] has had an ama
item.description: City Xtra @City_Xtra · 9min Erling Haaland on the Premier League Golden Boot race: "I think Igor [Thiago] has had an amazing season so far for Brentford, he's been showing some great qualities. So yeah, it's going to be an interesting fight..." [via @ESPNFC ] 5 9 159 3 mil
